summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ deferred tasks: Role Switcher, Communication Page, and Teacher Requests. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All deferred tasks implemented and working: 1) Role Switcher modal in sidebar with preview as school principal 2) Communication page with real API data 3) Teacher requests tab in Users Management. APIs tested: /api/user-roles/my-roles, /api/user-roles/switch, /api/communication/audience-counts, /api/communication/scheduled, /api/communication/sent, /api/communication/broadcast

admin_login.evidence: Admin login with admin@nassaq.com / Admin@123 successful, redirects to /admin dashboard

role_switcher_button.evidence: Role Switcher button (تبديل الدور) visible in sidebar when user has multiple roles

role_switcher_modal.evidence: Modal opens showing current role (مدير المنصة) and 9 school principal preview options

role_switch_to_school_principal.evidence: Successfully switched to school principal preview, shows success toast 'تم التبديل إلى دور مدير المدرسة'

communication_page_navigation.evidence: Communication page at /admin/communication loads correctly with stats and tabs

communication_stats.evidence: Stats cards show: الإشعارات (0), غير مقروء (0), رسائل مرسلة (0), مستلمة (0), مجدولة (0)

communication_tabs.evidence: Two tabs visible: الإشعارات (Notifications) and التواصل (Communication)

audience_counts.evidence: Audience buttons show real counts: الجميع (1,148), المدارس (9), المعلمين (133), الطلاب (501)

scheduled_messages.evidence: Scheduled messages section shows TEST_رسالة مجدولة with scheduled date

sent_messages.evidence: Sent messages section shows multiple messages including TEST_رسالة اختبار, اختبار البث

broadcast_message_form.evidence: Message compose form with title input, content textarea, audience selection, and send button

users_management_tabs.evidence: Three tabs: المستخدمين, مستخدمو المدارس, طلبات المعلمين المستقلين

teacher_requests_tab.evidence: Shows status filters (جميع الطلبات, المعتمدين 10, قيد الاعتماد 3, المرفوضين 4) and request cards

teacher_request_cards.evidence: Request cards show teacher name, status badge, phone, email, subject, education level, request date

test_details: test_get_communication_stats - PASSED (returns sent, scheduled, drafts, templates)
test_get_audience_counts - PASSED (returns all, schools, teachers, students counts)
